title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–14 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Colosseum Fighters, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as powerful fighters clash in the Colosseum and the scale of the tournament becomes clearer through Elizabello, Chinjao, and the other competitors.

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Just how long are you going to keep pissing people off, Bartolomeo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Why's no one kicking his ass !!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: In front of this error- mous audience, he's decided to brazenly do his business!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Never in the history of this colosseum have we seen such foolishness!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Isn't there anyone who will stop him!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There are people here taking this tournament seriously, brat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So forgive me... for attacking you from behind

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 01....!! Wait! Don't attack this defenseless man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Our hero has appeared! The fishman fighter, hack

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: What did he do!!? The one on the ground is hack!!! What the hell!!!?

summary: Pages 13–14 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
